speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. As you guys are making your way up and climbing using the roots and the rope and the interior, you begin to, now that you're not focused on what’s below, notice that a lot of the earth in this particular tunnel-- that isn't too wide necessarily, it's about three feet wide in most places-- You can see the claw marks where it's been dug out. The softer portion of the ground where you landed upon emerging from making your way down, you can see a lot of the earth and chunks of root that have been carved out. It wasn't a natural tunnel or something they discovered; they dug up into the safe house to retrieve whatever was inside. Nevertheless, you all make your way up into the hollow base of the safe house tree. You guys can set up camp if you'd like to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know if we leave the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, are we sleeping in the tree?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: People will keep watch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That way we'll have an early warning before they even manage to crawl their way up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And we know where the entrance is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The moment that they exit the pool, we'll know and it would wake me up, or you up, or anybody up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're just going to gloss over the fact that Fjord has three bird nicknames?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Bird-Eye Fjord I think is what he was getting at, you know?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Also very popular.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Kiri pipes up. (like Jester) "Bird-Eye Fjord."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's right, Kiri, Bird-Eye Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (like Jester) "Bird-Eye Fjord."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's sticking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (like Fjord) "Sticking."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That does not sound good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can we call you B.E.F. for short? Bird-Eye Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No. We make our way up the rope into the bottom of the tree, but the entrance is still open.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: At this point, it's probably just past dusk. There's a little bit of blue cresting into night time. Light's coming through the trees, but it looks like you're about half an hour out from a pitch black sky.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (like Jester) "I am Kiri."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: See, look at this, this is great! Okay, and then if they go, "Are you nice?" You say, "Yes, I'm very sweet."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (like Jester) "Yes, I'm very sweet."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If they say something you don't like, you say, "Go fuck yourself."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (like Jester) "Go fuck yourself."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, I can't believe you said it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like a sound board.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Go fuck yourself.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You say, "Fuck yourself."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (like Jester) "Go fuck yourself."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, that's good. Okay, that's a good start.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, if you get really excited, you should go (air horn blaring).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (air horn blaring)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, don't do that, Kiri! Don't!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin's hair gets poofed out and his tail floofs out and he starts growling at the sound.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we going to sleep?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: About what time is it, anyway? Light still coming in from the outside of the tree?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Assessing its design, paying attention to its construct and the handles, and the edging of where the different facets of it are affixed to this cage-like exterior to it, you really have no idea what material it's made from. The faint magical essence that comes off of it, and with the training you have had across the various schools of magic, this seems hard to pin down. You're not sure the source of its magic, but it does seem very old. It seems like it's been shaped or it's been polished from whatever its raw form was at one point in time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, it's probably just past dusk. There's a little bit of blue cresting into night time. Light's coming through the trees, but it looks like you're about half an hour out from a pitch black sky.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it my turn with the dodecahedron?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yes! Do you want it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: For today?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But wait for the morning, unless you want to use it today, and then somebody else will get it in the morning. Because it only lasts for 24 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you use it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I did not. Oh, I did. We have to save it for tomorrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I more want to examine it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yes, here. Do you want to take it out of the bag?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No. Can I borrow the bag?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Here's the bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to spend maybe a half-hour before bed not trying to use it, but just examine it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make an arcana check.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You rest so easily with the blood leaking out. You finish your watch, you wake up Nott and Jester, and you guys take on your second watch. Do you want to both make a roll for perception or--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, the rest of you find yourselves to sleep, or is there anything else you wish to do before the night’s done? Any order of taking watch, or are you all just resting under the protection of Caleb's silver thread?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No. Beau and I are up first.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll do second.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Second as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll say that was for your first watch. While you guys are having that conversation, one of you roll with advantage on your perception check, or you can both roll separately, your call.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's roll separately. Oof, terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep. Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, leave him hanging.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Her perception is low, you wouldn't see the high five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Five? Oh five!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Good in-character moment there. As you guys are finishing your conversation, your watch comes to an end without incident.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: With an arrow in our throat? I didn’t see-- (choking)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: If you ended up holding it for a few minutes, yes, because the idea is that you're casting the spell and then holding onto that last piece of the incantation.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we just blow up the hole?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, because we still want to go down there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why do we want to go down there? There's crazy people down there!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nott, shut up! Because there's treasure and stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You could just say, "Be quiet."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nott, please be quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Molly, I want you to get right on the edge of the hole and keep an eye down the shaft.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chirping) (like Jester) "Go fuck yourself."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I love her!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We woke her up, though, but it was cute.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Kiri, (shushing).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I able to prepare Magic Missile like a held spell for a fish head popping out of the hole?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Holding your action, if it comes back around, the spell is either fizzled or released. So you can wait for something and then cast the spell as an action.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But I’d lose the slot if I held the--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Two minutes pass. Three minutes pass.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But I’d lose the slot if I held the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you ended up holding it for a few minutes, yes, because the idea is that you're casting the spell and then holding onto that last piece of the incantation.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I won't do that, then, but I will watch the hole.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is our rope still dangling down the hole?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you pulled the rope up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hold Sacred Flame because it's a cantrip.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to activate one sword, hold it behind my back, sit at the edge, and wait to give a swing. See if anything is going to pop up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let it come all the way up if it does.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If it comes up, should we grab it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Grapple it, fall flat, kill it quietly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys take a moment in silence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It might be going back and telling its friends, though, and they’re all going to come back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You think those guys have strong family bonds?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Probably.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Five minutes go by.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You make your way down, the rope aiding you in the process. You get to the bottom, you as well. I'd like you both to roll stealth checks, please, as you emerge in the lower cavern.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You two gingerly step your way around the edge, back to the site you can see of the three corpses of the merrow there in the center of the opposite side of the cavern.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have my hand on Yasha's enormous, rippling shoulder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you make your way around to the other pool, you can see the water, disturbed relatively recently, isn't perfectly still, but it's nearing there. It's coming to rest. No sign of anything down there.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, do your shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I need about ten minutes. In the dark, I pull out the thread and I start doing the thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Make it a little faster than ten if you can.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I can't do that, but I will do that.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you guys complete the third watch for the evening, you sense the morning come as the temperature, which previously had gotten quite chilled, is beginning to rise a bit, though now you can still see your breath in the air. A faint bit of bluish light begins to appear at the outer edges of the driftwood piece that is wedged in the doorway to make it look flush with the rest of the exterior bark. You all complete a long rest. You have your abilities back, your hit points full, and you are ready to continue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, you begin to drag the bodies back into the central pool. They sink.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Flow in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You complete the latter half of it. Okay. You finish the spell, you sense the arcane, unseen net of the alarm click in, and it's prepared and set to keep watch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's get the shit out of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Run away!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys make your way back, climb back up the rope, and make your way into the interior of the tree, seemingly without incident.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Seemingly?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going back to sleep, you guys. I need to get my spells back.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the next watch since I'm awake.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yasha takes final watch. Go ahead and roll a perception check for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm freaked out, so I'm going to stay up with Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of you guys make perception checks for me, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Perception, 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Run away, run away!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Maybe it's the tensile strength of her arm muscles, but such a large instrument seems unexpectedly delicate across the features of your face. It's not a complete shave, there are areas that get missed because it's not a very fine implement, but for the most part, the stubble gets closer to your face. There are a few sections that are unevenly smooth, but it's an improvement from where it was before. It's as good a shave you can get with a greatsword. Manages to avoid nicking any major arteries, and as you complete your work, you're proud of it, the sweat on your brow-- Caleb has no idea of how it looks other than you reaching up and touching your chin as it finishes. The rest of you come to consciousness.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is your five-foot greatsword? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So sit here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Should I lie on the ground?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, lie down. I've never done it like that, but yeah, lie down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Have you done this before?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I have done this before.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: With that?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Not with this, something a little smaller.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I lie on the floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. In the early dawn hours of the new day, as the blue begins to slowly become brighter in the distance--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait! This means we are friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (inhales)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You don't have to hold your breath because it will take a very long time and you'll pass out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That might be better.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You need to relax, breathe in, breathe out. Okay, I got it. Here we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I would like you to roll a dexterity check, please. Take advantage because he's not moving.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Four globules of light rise up around you as you begin to shave.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It was a 14. You get pulled through right next to it there, in the middle of the water. As you fall to the ground, it's going to attempt to bite at you. Since you're in the water, outside of your terrain, I will give it advantage on the strike, because you're now thrashing water and swimming, and it's in its own terrain. That'll be 18 to hit. With the bite on you there, you take an additional eight points of piercing damage. At that moment, this one here is going to turn around onto Fjord, and is going to shift this way and unleash both bite and claw attack against you, Fjord. 17 to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eight misses, unfortunately. Next one swings, and a miss. Now the merrow all go together, because you guys left a big old gap of initiative there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's after Yasha, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. First part, I'm going to say-- Let's make it fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, let's.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This guy here is going to take his trident and chuck it right towards Beau.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are these free tridents, or do they also have that cord that's attached to them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like the harpoons?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They have the cords still attached. That's a 17 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 17 is my armor class.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. With that to there, first off, Beau. As it strikes you in the chest, you take ten points of piercing damage, and I need you to make a strength check for me, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So good at this. Just a straight check, or a saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 19-- sorry, ten. It looked like a 19 upside down.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Beau, I need you to make a dexterity saving throw, since you're the one closest to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Run away!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see little sparks of lightning arcing through the cloud as it spools above.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Motherfucking druid fish.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You vanish out of the space. That's a hell of a round. Yasha, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Flanking? It's advantage on your attacks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so first attack. 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15 does hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Great. And the second one. Neither of those are a crit, but that's a 24 on the second one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits, roll damage for each.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (counting) 17. For the Hexblade, four points of damage, so 21 on the first one. (counting) 17 on the second.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How do you want to do this? You fucked that guy up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll shift in right behind him and see Molly looking around, give him a little wink, and I'll take the falchion and take the back of his head off.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Molly, it’s pulling back ready to leap at you, and as it lurches towards you it stops, you watch as the upper half of its shoulders and head slip and slough off into the water.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You fucking arsehole.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sorry. I was getting what for, man. Shit. And I'll-- oh wait. Natural 20. Peace out!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Ooh. 31 points of damage in one round. As you're carving through it rapidly, it is looking pretty hurt. It's not on death's door, but you singlehandedly carved it pretty hard in one round.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Advantage to disadvantage, straight roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a straight roll if you stay there, or a straight roll if you end up flanking it. Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Actually, here's an interesting thing, is-- oh, god, yeah. I don't want to be in the water, so I'm going to stay on that little patch of land so I don't get--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So make your four attacks on it, if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right, first two rounds. That's a 14 and a natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah, that'll do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So the natural 20 is double the dice?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep, just roll the dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right. Eh. That's nine. And the other one is 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 11 points of damage. And then your third strike with your Haste.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Third and fourth. That's-- one of them misses, but the other one's 19, the other one hits, the other one is ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so that hits on the third strike, there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's better. 11 points of damage.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's now the shallow priest's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's fine. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're in the water, so disadvantage on your attacks.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Disadvantage. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I didn't even realize I was sitting here like---

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18 hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's like this little dark cloud right over you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on, Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Kill it, Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's what you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nein!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: 12 for the first hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on, buddy.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 20 hits. Roll damage for your second strike.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 points of damage. It is so close. It is hurt so bad. As you slash twice, in the water, you see these large arcs of stale, stagnant cave water splashing in the air with this gleaming blade as Yasha's tearing into it. The pool around it is turning dark purple as its blood is seeping in and it's looking desperately around for some means of escape. That end your turn, Yasha?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I don't think I can't do anything else.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: If you guys want to take a short rest, if you guys are inspecting the rest of the area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you look at the trident, it looks like it's a very tightly woven rope, but the individual threads of rope are treated like a leather-type stat, so it's a really tight leather cord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it attached to his person in some way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From what you can see, where it was dangling from there, they’re wrapped in a loose loop around the side of their armor, and when they throw it, they catch the end of it and pull it back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the trident and unhook it from his armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. It's about 60 feet of leather cord, if you want to call it that. Sturdy leather cord. It's heavy, so it's about twice the weight of hemp rope. It's stronger, but it's heavier.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: These guys were big.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, they're pretty strong.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I take a short rest while everyone's doing this?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 14, okay. You can see scattered bits of gold and silver and copper that have been lost amongst the steps here, some of them covered in dirt or mud and can be cleaned and pulled out of there. As you ascend the steps, if anybody wants to join Fjord as well? You go with him as well? You also see there's a bunch of silverware thrown around. Very nice, fine silverware that is, in many cases, partially packed with more mud, sand, and whatever grime is here. It looks like everything was brought here, and largely a number of it has been discarded or left with no particular purpose. As you begin to pore through some of it, you see there's a crate that's partially open. There's a cache of weapons in there that are bound in clusters with leather straps around them. Looking there, there are four well-made longswords, four well-made shortswords, two battleaxes, and two halberds that are part of this cache. They're resting open on the inside of this open crate. There's a locked, dark wood case, about four feet across and a foot wide, that is currently closed and latched. There's also a locked iron box that's flat, a foot and a half by a foot and a half. It's simple, steel, iron look to it. Then there's the stone formation that's about six to ten foot at different places. It's a bit oblong and strange. It's not a perfect oval, but it's made to be this pool of water, where the mist is rising and sifting out of it. Around the edges of it, there are dozens and dozens of metallic objects of different shapes and configurations and designs. Make a religion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Were you holding those the whole time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chirping) Points to the side corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Put those books in this pink bag, okay? All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are there any stairways, or doors, or gates, or anything that would lead upwards from this cavern?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you want to start inspecting the area  up the stairs, there's a platform above where there's more of the boxes and crates and there's piles of things gathered around some sort of rock formation, where that mist seems to be emanating from, which is still loosely drifting off of the surface of the water.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'll take a closer look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make an investigation check.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, so you begin concentrating another ten minutes on the cat's eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All this shit doesn't exist, so sometimes it's hard to tell what we're talking about.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It exists, Liam.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That, you do have immediate grasp of what it is capable of.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This blade is called Summer's Dance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Ooh, I want to dance with somebody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) I want to feel the heat with somebody!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Mollymauk?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I feel like this might be good for you. There is a kind of magic that I do not even possess that allows you to vanish from one point and reappear in another, and this blade will allow you to do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (maniacal laughter) You're going to get yours, oh yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It is a very fine blade. It is more lethal than a regular blade and will allow you to poof, poof, poof.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll be living the dream.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can all argue over it, but I hand it to Mollymauk. As well as the cat's eye.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So wait another ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This blade is called Summer's Dance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Ooh, I want to dance with somebody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) I want to feel the heat with somebody!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Mollymauk?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I feel like this might be good for you. There is a kind of magic that I do not even possess that allows you to vanish from one point and reappear in another, and this blade will allow you to do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (maniacal laughter) You're going to get yours, oh yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It is a very fine blade. It is more lethal than a regular blade and will allow you to poof, poof, poof.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll be living the dream.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can all argue over it, but I hand it to Mollymauk. As well as the cat's eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you begin concentrating another ten minutes on the cat's eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it one spell, one item?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You choose one object to cast on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, next.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: (splashing water, sputtering) Salt water, you start coughing for a minute and come up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They wanted this eye thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was the whole reason they attacked was-- what if they attack you now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: For what?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: For having the thing inside of you!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: But you can't see it! I don't have it!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe they can sense it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We solved it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We solved the mystery.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Dancing Lights and scour the room. Is there anything we're missing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How big is the well?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's roughly five to eight feet in diameter.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What happens if you look over, do you see yourself?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, that's not a bad call. I'll check my reflection in the well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You look in the well, the water is moving in there. It's you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to push his head underneath the water.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys gather up as much as you can, take your way via the rope through the water, Kiri in tow. You make your way back up, handing things off up into the tunnel. Eventually, over the next hour or so, get most of what was down there that you could back up into the safe house.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh man, ritual casting.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, let’s get out of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This place is definitely making me nervous. We should do our best to cut off this particular flow-through.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe they were gathering a bunch of these items because they were looking for the exact one for this one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think they were trying to activate it. They were trying to please it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we gather up all of the things and put them back up in the tree?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can we put them all in the bag?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anybody want any of the weapons? Shortswords, longswords, battleaxes?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's leave it exactly where they're supposed to be so we did our job.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean, "where they're supposed to be?" They stole it from the smugglers.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're working for the smugglers. We'll put it back in the safe house.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, we'll take it all back upstairs.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Doesn't jog your memory. It looks old. Looks like it's been around a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I have a staff.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Any shortswords better than my shortsword?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're well-made and fresh.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I like mine. Do they seem sharper, or deadlier?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're less worn, but they're not deadlier, per se.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Who's holding onto the broken-off hilt?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I put it in the bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you mind if I carry that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You know, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I take 30 seconds to see if it jogs my memory since I'm such a history buff?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, make a history check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I assist him on that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You have assistance. Roll with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Nope. Big 13.
